title: conv2d_transpose malformed arguments abort process

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Call conv2d_transpose with malformed filter/output_shape arguments.
expected: TensorFlow should reject malformed argument types/shapes with a normal exception.
observed: The process aborts after a CHECK failure: d < dims() (2 vs. 0).
